ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of team members working on the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight or importance of the category in the overall evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the criterion belongs to */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion */,
  "criterion_description" TEXT /* Description of the criterion */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Numerical score associated with the criterion (e.g., 0-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criterion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criterion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_criteria_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being evaluated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the evaluation belongs to */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion used for evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was conducted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes from the evaluator */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Numerical score given by the evaluator */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the evaluation is approved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_evaluations_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES evaluation_criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_evaluations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_evaluations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Project Manager, UX Designer, Evaluator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the feedback is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., User Testing, Insights) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feedback has been addressed */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insights" (
  "insight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insight */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedback entry the insight is derived from */,
  "insight_text" TEXT /* Text of the insight */,
  "insight_date" TEXT /* Date the insight was generated */,
  "insight_type" TEXT /* Type of insight (e.g., Conceptual, Sublime) */,
  "is_actionable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the insight is actionable */,
  "action_plan" TEXT /* Plan of action to address the insight */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the insight was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the insight was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insights_feedback_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedback_id") REFERENCES feedback ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report is related to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Summary, Detailed) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is published */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
